efs
v. 0.6.0
  1. org.efs.event
  2. IEfsEvent

Uses of Interface
org.efs.event.IEfsEvent

Packages that use IEfsEvent
Package
Description
org.efs.activator.event
This package defines the ActivatorEvent posted by EfsActivator to registered agents.
org.efs.bus
EfsEventBus provides a loosely-coupled interface between efs agents.
org.efs.dispatcher
Dispatcher forwards events to agents in an effectively single-threaded manner.
org.efs.event
Contains classes which define efs events.
org.efs.event.type
Contains EfsEventLayout class which provides a reflective definition of an IEfsEvent class.
org.efs.feed
 
org.efs.timer
efs timer package provides EfsScheduledExecutor which encapsulates a ScheduledExecutorService.

  • Uses of IEfsEvent in org.efs.activator.event

    Classes in org.efs.activator.event that implement IEfsEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ActivatorEvent
    As EfsActivator steps through its workflow, its publishes two ActivatorEvents for each step: An in-progress transition with a zero transition duration.

  • Uses of IEfsEvent in org.efs.bus

    Classes in org.efs.bus with type parameters of type IEfsEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static final class 
    EfsEventBus.Advertisement<E extends IEfsEvent>
    An advertisement is an publishing agent's access point to a event class+topic feed.
    static class 
    EfsEventBus.Subscription<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Abstract base class for concrete, inbox, and router subscriptions.
    final class 
    EfsPublishStatus<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Reports a given topic's publish status.
    static final class 
    EfsPublishStatus.Builder<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Builder class used to create EfsPublishStatus instances.
    final class 
    EfsSubscribeStatus<E extends IEfsEvent>
    This event is sent to publishing agents to inform on number of in-place subscribers for a given topic.
    static final class 
    EfsSubscribeStatus.Builder<E extends IEfsEvent>
    TODO
    interface 
    IEventRouter<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Implement this interface to dynamically route an event to a given agent and callback pair.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    EfsPublishStatus<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Reports a given topic's publish status.

    EfsSubscribeStatus<E extends IEfsEvent>

    Methods in org.efs.bus with type parameters of type IEfsEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <E extends IEfsEvent>
    void
    EfsEventBus.addTopic(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey)
    Reports a event topic key to bus independent of an advertisement or subscription.
    <E extends IEfsEvent>
    void
    EfsEventBus.addTopics(Class<E> eventClass, List<String> topics)
    Reports multiple topics for a given event class independent of an advertisement or subscription.
    <E extends IEfsEvent>
    EfsEventBus.Advertisement<E>
    EfsEventBus.advertise(EfsTopicKey<E> topicKey, Consumer<EfsSubscribeStatus<E>> sscb, IEfsAgent publisher)
    Advertises an event class, topic published by an agent, returning a closeable instance used to retract this advertisement when closed.
    <E extends IEfsEvent>
    org.efs.bus.EfsEventBus.WildcardAdvertisement<E>
    EfsEventBus.advertiseAll(Class<E> eventClass, String regexTopic, Consumer<EfsSubscribeStatus<E>> sscb, Consumer<EfsTopicKey<E>> topicUpdate, IEfsAgent publisher)

    Returns a new EfsPublishStatus builder instance.

  • Uses of IEfsEvent in org.efs.dispatcher

    Classes in org.efs.dispatcher with type parameters of type IEfsEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    EfsDispatchTarget<E extends IEfsEvent>
    This immutable class contains Consumer and IEfsAgent used by EfsDispatcher.dispatch(EfsDispatchTarget, IEfsEvent) \ to post an event.
    final class 
    ReplyTo<E extends IEfsEvent>
    This class is used when an agent posting an event to a second agent expecting a reply to its event.
    Methods in org.efs.dispatcher with type parameters of type IEfsEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <E extends IEfsEvent>
    void
    EfsDispatcher.dispatch(Consumer<E> callback, E event, IEfsAgent agent)
    Forwards event to agent using given callback.
    static <E extends IEfsEvent>
    void
    EfsDispatcher.dispatch(EfsDispatchTarget<E> target, E event)
    Forwards event to agent and callback contained in dispatch target.

  • Uses of IEfsEvent in org.efs.event

    Classes in org.efs.event with type parameters of type IEfsEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ConflationEvent<E extends IEfsEvent>
    This mutable event allows changing the encapsulated event instance even when this ConflationEvent is posted to an agent event queue.
    final class 
    EfsEventWrapper<E extends IEfsEvent>
    This class provides meta-information concerning the encapsulated event.
    static final class 
    EfsEventWrapper.Builder<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Builder for constructing an EfsEventWrapper instance.
    final class 
    EfsTopicKey<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Immutable key containing efs event class and topic uniquely defining an efs bus feed instance.
    interface 
    IEfsEventBuilder<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Interface defines an efs event builder class used to create an IEfsEvent instance.
    Classes in org.efs.event that implement IEfsEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    ConflationEvent<E extends IEfsEvent>
    This mutable event allows changing the encapsulated event instance even when this ConflationEvent is posted to an agent event queue.

    Method
    Description

    Returns a new efs event wrapper builder.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    InvalidEventException(Class<? extends IEfsEvent> eventClass, String msg)
    Creates a new instance of InvalidEventException containing invalid efs event class and detail message.
     
    InvalidEventException(Class<? extends IEfsEvent> eventClass, String msg, Throwable cause)
    Constructs an instance of InvalidEventException with the specified efs event class, detail message, and cause.

  • Uses of IEfsEvent in org.efs.feed

    Classes in org.efs.feed with type parameters of type IEfsEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    final class 
    EfsFeed<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Responsible for storing and forwarding efs events.
    final class 
    EfsFeedKey<E extends IEfsEvent>
    Immutable key containing efs event class and subject uniquely defining an efs feed instance.
    final class 
    EfsSubscription<E extends IEfsEvent>
    EfsFeed.subscribe(IEfsAgent, Consumer, EfsInterval) returns an EfsSubscription instance which may be used to EfsSubscription.close() the subscription.
    Methods in org.efs.feed with type parameters of type IEfsEvent
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <E extends IEfsEvent>
    EfsFeedKey<E>
    EfsFeedKey.getKey(Class<E> ec, String subject)
    Returns a unique efs feed key instance for given efs event class and feed subject.
    static <E extends IEfsEvent>
    EfsFeed<E>
    EfsFeed.openFeed(EfsFeedKey<E> key)
    Returns efs feed associated with the given feed key.
    static <E extends IEfsEvent>
    void
    EfsFeed.setFeedDispatcher(Class<E> eventClass, String dispatcherName)
    Maps efs event class to efs dispatcher used for feeds for that event class.

    Method
    Description

    Method
    Description
